title: Sodium Shader Support
description: Mod that allows to change sodium shaders with resource packs.
body:
## Sodium Shader Support (1.19.4)
Sodium, as good render optimization mod, changes vanilla block shaders to its own but it didn't provide changing these shaders throught resource packs.

This mod provides changes of sodium shader by resource pack.

## Usage
Load this mod with Sodium and set new namespace sodium in your pack.

Sodium shaders are in [assets/sodium/shaders/blocks/](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric/tree/1.19.3/dev/src/main/resources/assets/sodium/shaders/blocks) and named block_layer_opaque.

Shader's code is vanilla-like but with changed names of in/out/uniform values names.
